## [0.9.0] - 2025-06-26

- Clippy

## [0.7.0] - 2025-03-28

### 🚀 Features

- Use a temporary dockerfile and add it to the context directly (#66)

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- Correctly set the image builder version
- Disable image pull if present locally
- Test, build and perf tuning
- Enable pull again
- Buildkit behind feature flag (#65)
